pi_items.source: Task description in task.json line 5 and export_result.sh verification script lines 26-34
Consistent usage across all task setup scripts (setup_task.sh line 28, export_result.sh line 17) and verified in other task configurations across the environment

privileged_info_summary: The task adds two synthetic cooking instructions ('No Onions' and 'Extra Crispy') to a real Floreant POS system running Apache Derby database at /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server. The Back Office PIN is 1111. All metadata values are verified against the task scripts and environment configuration files.
